summary: Made a minimal seam pass to differentiate the opening construction from the adjacent chapter's object-led domestic opening and to tighten the handoff into the missing-ledger search that begins the next chapter.
edits: Reframed the opening around Della's post-supper perception and action instead of an object-first house description.
Preserved the cemetery residue, ledger reveal, and chapter beats without altering scene meaning.
Added a brief final bridge indicating Della will turn out the cellar and pantry before breakfast, aligning with the next chapter's opening search.
